amen_cooking_lpg.label: LPG cooking

amen_cooking_lpg.long: Share of HHs using LPG as main cooking fuel.

amen_cooking_modern.long: Share of HHs using modern cooking fuel (LPG/biogas/electricity).

amen_cooking_traditional.long: Share of HHs using traditional cooking fuel (wood/kerosene/dung/other).

amen_lighting_electricity.label: Electric lighting
amen_lighting_electricity.short: Share of HHs with electricity as main lighting (incl.
amen_lighting_electricity.long: Share of HHs with electricity as main lighting (incl. solar from 2011).

amen_toilet_modern.label: Modern toilet

amen_toilet_modern.long: Share of HHs with modern (flush) toilet.

amen_toilet_any.label: Any toilet
amen_toilet_any.short: Share of HHs with any kind of toilet (modern+ordinary+public).
amen_toilet_any.long: Share of HHs with any kind of toilet (modern+ordinary+public).

amen_assets_radio.label: Radio
amen_assets_radio.short: Share of HHs owning a radio.
amen_assets_radio.long: Share of HHs owning a radio.

amen_assets_tv.label: Television
amen_assets_tv.short: Share of HHs owning a television.
amen_assets_tv.long: Share of HHs owning a television.

amen_assets_computer.label: Computer

amen_assets_computer.long: Share of HHs owning a computer/laptop. (NA in 2001 — not collected.)

amen_assets_internet.label: Internet
amen_assets_internet.short: Share of HHs with internet access.
amen_assets_internet.long: Share of HHs with internet access. (NA in 2001 — not collected.)

amen_assets_cycle.label: Bicycle
amen_assets_cycle.short: Share of HHs owning a bicycle.
amen_assets_cycle.long: Share of HHs owning a bicycle.

amen_assets_motorcycle.label: Motorcycle
amen_assets_motorcycle.short: Share of HHs owning a motorcycle/scooter.
amen_assets_motorcycle.long: Share of HHs owning a motorcycle/scooter.

amen_assets_car.label: Car / jeep
amen_assets_car.short: Share of HHs owning a car/jeep/van.
amen_assets_car.long: Share of HHs owning a car/jeep/van.

amen_assets_fridge.label: Refrigerator
amen_assets_fridge.short: Share of HHs owning a refrigerator.
amen_assets_fridge.long: Share of HHs owning a refrigerator.

amen_assets_none.label: No assets
amen_assets_none.short: Share of HHs owning none of the listed assets.
amen_assets_none.long: Share of HHs owning none of the listed assets.

amen_asset_count_mean.label: Mean asset count
amen_asset_count_mean.short: Mean number of distinct assets owned per HH.
amen_asset_count_mean.long: Mean number of distinct assets owned per HH.

edu_literate.label: Literacy
edu_literate.short: Share of population 6+ who can read and write.
edu_literate.long: Share of population 6+ who can read and write.

edu_school_attend_6_16.label: School attendance (6-16)
edu_school_attend_6_16.short: Share of children 6-16 currently attending school/college.
edu_school_attend_6_16.long: Share of children 6-16 currently attending school/college.

edu_attain_primary_plus.label: Primary+ attainment
edu_attain_primary_plus.short: Share of pop 25+ with at least primary education completed (class 5+).
edu_attain_primary_plus.long: Share of pop 25+ with at least primary education completed (class 5+).

edu_attain_tertiary.label: Tertiary attainment
edu_attain_tertiary.short: Share of pop 25+ with bachelor's or higher.
edu_attain_tertiary.long: Share of pop 25+ with bachelor's or higher.

edu_years_mean.label: Mean years of schooling
edu_years_mean.short: Mean completed schooling years (top-coded at 15), pop 25+.
edu_years_mean.long: Mean completed schooling years (top-coded at 15), pop 25+.

housing_own.label: Own dwelling
housing_own.short: Share of HHs owning their dwelling (vs rented/institutional).
housing_own.long: Share of HHs owning their dwelling (vs rented/institutional). NA in 2001 if q6_hown absent.

housing_rented.label: Rented dwelling
housing_rented.short: Share of HHs in rented dwelling.
housing_rented.long: Share of HHs in rented dwelling.

fem_ownership_house.label: Female owns house
fem_ownership_house.short: Share of HHs where the dwelling is (partly) in a woman's name.
fem_ownership_house.long: Share of HHs where the dwelling is (partly) in a woman's name.

fem_ownership_land.label: Female owns land
fem_ownership_land.short: Share of HHs where land is (partly) in a woman's name.
fem_ownership_land.long: Share of HHs where land is (partly) in a woman's name.

fem_ownership_both.label: Female owns both
fem_ownership_both.short: Share of HHs where BOTH house and land are in a woman's name.
fem_ownership_both.long: Share of HHs where BOTH house and land are in a woman's name.

fem_ownership_livestock.label: Female owns livestock
fem_ownership_livestock.short: Share of HHs with female livestock ownership.
fem_ownership_livestock.long: Share of HHs with female livestock ownership. (Only 2001 collected this.)

mar_female_age_first_mean.label: Female age at first marriage
mar_female_age_first_mean.short: Mean age at first marriage for women 20-24 (cohort proxy).
mar_female_age_first_mean.long: Mean age at first marriage for women 20-24 (cohort proxy).
mar_female_age_first_mean.universe: Women 20-24 with reported age at 1st marriage.

mar_female_married_by_18.label: Female married by 18

mar_female_married_by_18.long: Share of women 20-24 married before age 18 (child marriage).

fert_births_last12m_share.long: Share of ever-married women 15-49 who had ≥1 live birth in last 12 months.

work_share_agriculture.label: Agri share of work

work_share_agriculture.long: Share of pop 15-59 whose main activity is agriculture.

work_share_nonagriculture.label: Non-agri share of work

work_share_household_chores.label: Chores only
work_share_household_chores.short: Share primarily engaged in unpaid household chores.
work_share_household_chores.long: Share primarily engaged in unpaid household chores.

work_lfp.label: Labour-force participation
work_lfp.short: Share of pop 15-59 that is economically active (any work).
work_lfp.long: Share of pop 15-59 that is economically active (any work).

occ_share_managers.label: Managers
occ_share_managers.short: Share in managerial occupations (ISCO major group 1).
occ_share_managers.long: Share in managerial occupations (ISCO major group 1).

occ_share_craft_trades.label: Craft & trades
occ_share_craft_trades.short: Share in craft & related trades workers (ISCO 7).
occ_share_craft_trades.long: Share in craft & related trades workers (ISCO 7).

occ_share_machine_operators.label: Machine operators
occ_share_machine_operators.short: Share in plant & machine operators and assemblers (ISCO 8).
occ_share_machine_operators.long: Share in plant & machine operators and assemblers (ISCO 8).

ind_construction.label: Construction
ind_construction.long: Share in construction. Key remittance-sensitive sector in Nepal.

ind_wholesale_retail.label: Wholesale & retail
ind_wholesale_retail.short: Share in wholesale and retail trade.
ind_wholesale_retail.long: Share in wholesale and retail trade.

ind_education.label: Education
ind_education.short: Share employed in the education sector.
ind_education.long: Share employed in the education sector.

emp_share_employer.label: Employer
emp_share_employer.short: Share of workers who are employers.
emp_share_employer.long: Share of workers who are employers.

emp_share_employee.label: Employee
emp_share_employee.short: Share of workers who are employees.
emp_share_employee.long: Share of workers who are employees.

emp_share_self_employed.label: Self-employed
emp_share_self_employed.short: Share of workers who are own-account/self-employed.
emp_share_self_employed.long: Share of workers who are own-account/self-employed.

emp_share_unpaid_family_worker.label: Unpaid family worker
emp_share_unpaid_family_worker.short: Share of workers who are unpaid family workers.
emp_share_unpaid_family_worker.long: Share of workers who are unpaid family workers.

mig_in_share.label: In-migrant share
mig_in_share.short: Share of pop who moved to current LG in past 5 yrs (2001/11) or most recent move (2021).
mig_in_share.long: Share of pop who moved to current LG in past 5 yrs (2001/11) or most recent move (2021).

mig_in_domestic.label: Domestic in-migrants
mig_in_domestic.short: Share of in-migrants from elsewhere in Nepal.
mig_in_domestic.long: Share of in-migrants from elsewhere in Nepal.

mig_in_international.label: International in-migrants
mig_in_international.short: Share of in-migrants from abroad (return migrants).
mig_in_international.long: Share of in-migrants from abroad (return migrants).

mig_in_reason_economic.label: Economic reason
mig_in_reason_economic.short: Share of in-migrants moving for economic reasons (work/trade/service/agri/returning).
mig_in_reason_economic.long: Share of in-migrants moving for economic reasons (work/trade/service/agri/returning).

mig_in_reason_marriage.label: Marriage reason
mig_in_reason_marriage.short: Share of in-migrants whose reason was marriage.
mig_in_reason_marriage.long: Share of in-migrants whose reason was marriage.

mig_in_return.label: Return migrants
mig_in_return.short: Share of in-migrants whose reason was 'returning back'.
mig_in_return.long: Share of in-migrants whose reason was 'returning back'. Only 2021.

flfp_all.label: Female LFP
flfp_all.short: Female labor force participation (any economic work) among women 15-59.
flfp_all.long: Female labor force participation (any economic work) among women 15-59.

flfp_agri.label: Female LFP — agri
flfp_agri.short: Share of women 15-59 whose main activity is agriculture (remittance → feminization of agri).
flfp_agri.long: Share of women 15-59 whose main activity is agriculture (remittance → feminization of agri).

flfp_nonagri.label: Female LFP — non-agri
flfp_nonagri.short: Share of women 15-59 in non-agricultural economic activity.
flfp_nonagri.long: Share of women 15-59 in non-agricultural economic activity.

flfp_wage.label: Female LFP — wage
flfp_wage.short: Share of women 15-59 in wage/salaried non-agri work.
flfp_wage.long: Share of women 15-59 in wage/salaried non-agri work.

flfp_chores_only.label: Female chores only
flfp_chores_only.short: Share of women 15-59 whose main activity is household chores (no economic work).
flfp_chores_only.long: Share of women 15-59 whose main activity is household chores (no economic work).

head_female_share.label: Female head
head_female_share.short: Share of households with a female head (de-facto female-headed HHs rise with male out-migration).
head_female_share.long: Share of households with a female head (de-facto female-headed HHs rise with male out-migration).

head_elderly_share.label: Elderly head
head_elderly_share.short: Share of HHs with elderly (60+) head.
head_elderly_share.long: Share of HHs with elderly (60+) head.

head_young_share.label: Young head
head_young_share.short: Share of HHs with young (<30) head.
head_young_share.long: Share of HHs with young (<30) head.

head_female_elderly.label: Female elderly head
head_female_elderly.short: Share of HHs with elderly female head.
head_female_elderly.long: Share of HHs with elderly female head.

left_not_with_both.label: Not with both parents
left_not_with_both.short: Share of children <16 NOT living with both parents.
left_not_with_both.long: Share of children <16 NOT living with both parents. Direct migration-linked outcome. NA in 2001.

left_mother_only.label: With mother only
left_mother_only.short: Share of children <16 living with mother only (common when father is abroad).
left_mother_only.long: Share of children <16 living with mother only (common when father is abroad).

left_father_only.label: With father only
left_father_only.short: Share of children <16 living with father only.
left_father_only.long: Share of children <16 living with father only.

left_with_relatives.label: With relatives
left_with_relatives.short: Share of children <16 living with other relatives (neither parent).
left_with_relatives.long: Share of children <16 living with other relatives (neither parent).

left_without_parents.label: Without either parent
left_without_parents.short: Share of children <16 living without either parent (relatives/employer/other).
left_without_parents.long: Share of children <16 living without either parent (relatives/employer/other).

absent_hh_share.label: HH share with absentee
absent_hh_share.short: Share of HHs with at least one member currently abroad (absentee).
absent_hh_share.long: Share of HHs with at least one member currently abroad (absentee).

hh_death_12m.label: Death in HH last 12m
hh_death_12m.short: Share of HHs reporting any death in the past 12 months.
hh_death_12m.long: Share of HHs reporting any death in the past 12 months. Only 2021.

agro_hh.label: HH operates farm
agro_hh.short: 1 if HH owns plots, grew crops, or has livestock.
agro_hh.long: 1 if HH owns plots, grew crops, or has livestock.

total_owned_area_sqm.label: Owned area (sqm)
total_owned_area_sqm.short: Sum of areas of all owned plots.
total_owned_area_sqm.long: Sum of areas of all owned plots.

cultivated_area_sqm.label: Cultivated area (sqm)
cultivated_area_sqm.short: Area of own plots self-cropped (wet season).
cultivated_area_sqm.long: Area of own plots self-cropped (wet season).

share_self_wet.label: Self-cultivated (wet)
share_self_wet.short: Share of owned plots self-cultivated in wet season.
share_self_wet.long: Share of owned plots self-cultivated in wet season.

share_rented_out_wet.label: Rented out (wet)
share_rented_out_wet.short: Share of owned plots rented/sharecropped/mortgaged out (wet).
share_rented_out_wet.long: Share of owned plots rented/sharecropped/mortgaged out (wet).

share_both_seasons.label: Cultivated both seasons
share_both_seasons.short: Share of plots self-cultivated in BOTH seasons (intensity).
share_both_seasons.long: Share of plots self-cultivated in BOTH seasons (intensity).

n_crops_total.label: # crops grown
n_crops_total.short: Distinct crops grown across both seasons.
n_crops_total.long: Distinct crops grown across both seasons.

multi_season.label: Multi-season HH
multi_season.short: 1 if HH grew at least one crop in BOTH seasons.
multi_season.long: 1 if HH grew at least one crop in BOTH seasons.

grows_staple.label: Grows staples
grows_staple.short: 1 if HH grew rice, wheat, maize, millet, barley.
grows_staple.long: 1 if HH grew rice, wheat, maize, millet, barley.

grows_cashcrop.label: Grows cash crops
grows_cashcrop.short: 1 if HH grew sugarcane, jute, tobacco, oilseed, etc.
grows_cashcrop.long: 1 if HH grew sugarcane, jute, tobacco, oilseed, etc.

grows_horticulture.label: Grows horticulture
grows_horticulture.short: 1 if HH grew any vegetable or fruit.
grows_horticulture.long: 1 if HH grew any vegetable or fruit.

staple_value_share.label: Staple share of value
staple_value_share.short: Share of harvest value from staples.
staple_value_share.long: Share of harvest value from staples.

food_exp_total_7day.label: Food expenditure 7d (Rs)
food_exp_total_7day.short: Total food value (purchased + home-produced + received as gift), 7-day recall.
food_exp_total_7day.long: Total food value (purchased + home-produced + received as gift), 7-day recall.

food_exp_protein_7day.label: Protein expenditure 7d
food_exp_protein_7day.long: Rs. value of protein foods: meat/fish, dairy, eggs, pulses — all sources.

food_exp_staples_7day.label: Staples expenditure 7d
food_exp_staples_7day.long: Rs. value of cereals/grains (rice, wheat, maize, millet, barley, beaten rice) across all sources.

food_insec_any.label: Any food insecurity
food_insec_any.short: 1 if any of 9 severity items reported above 'Never'; 0 if gateway=No or all 'Never'; NA if gateway missing.
food_insec_any.long: 1 if any of 9 severity items reported above 'Never'; 0 if gateway=No or all 'Never'; NA if gateway missing.

food_insec_score.label: Food insecurity score
food_insec_score.short: 0–27 HFIAS-style severity sum (Never=0, Rarely=1, Sometimes=2, Often=3).
food_insec_score.long: 0–27 HFIAS-style severity sum (Never=0, Rarely=1, Sometimes=2, Often=3). Gateway=No → 0.

food_insec_worried.label: Food-worried
food_insec_worried.short: 1 if HH worried about food in any month in past 12 (gateway question); 0 if no worry; NA if not asked.
food_insec_worried.long: 1 if HH worried about food in any month in past 12 (gateway question); 0 if no worry; NA if not asked.

nonfood_exp_30day.label: Non-food 30d (Rs)
nonfood_exp_30day.short: Total frequent-nonfood spending reported over past 30 days.
nonfood_exp_30day.long: Total frequent-nonfood spending reported over past 30 days.

nonfood_exp_12m.label: Non-food 12m (Rs)
nonfood_exp_12m.short: Total nonfood spending over past 12 months (frequent annual-recall + infrequent).
nonfood_exp_12m.long: Total nonfood spending over past 12 months (frequent annual-recall + infrequent).

nonfood_communication_12m.label: Communication 12m
nonfood_communication_12m.short: Telephone sets, mobile phones, postal/telegram/fax expenses.
nonfood_communication_12m.long: Telephone sets, mobile phones, postal/telegram/fax expenses.

nonfood_transport_12m.label: Transport 12m
nonfood_transport_12m.short: Public transport, petrol/diesel, bicycles, motorcycles, cars, vehicle repair/registration.
nonfood_transport_12m.long: Public transport, petrol/diesel, bicycles, motorcycles, cars, vehicle repair/registration.

nonfood_entertainment_leisure_12m.label: Entertainment 12m
nonfood_entertainment_leisure_12m.short: Cinema, CDs, newspapers, books, stationery, toys, sports, holidays, TV/VCR/radio/camera.
nonfood_entertainment_leisure_12m.long: Cinema, CDs, newspapers, books, stationery, toys, sports, holidays, TV/VCR/radio/camera.

nonfood_fuel_lighting_12m.label: Fuel & lighting 12m
nonfood_fuel_lighting_12m.short: Wood, LPG, kerosene, coal, matches, candles, lanterns, light bulbs, batteries.
nonfood_fuel_lighting_12m.long: Wood, LPG, kerosene, coal, matches, candles, lanterns, light bulbs, batteries.

any_enrolled.label: Any enrolled HH
any_enrolled.short: 1 if any HH member currently attending
any_enrolled.long: 1 if any HH member currently attending

n_enrolled.label: # enrolled in HH
n_enrolled.short: Count of HH members currently attending school
n_enrolled.long: Count of HH members currently attending school

n_private_school.label: # in private school
n_private_school.short: Count of currently-attending members in private/institutional schools
n_private_school.long: Count of currently-attending members in private/institutional schools

edu_spend_total_12m.label: Total edu spend 12m
edu_spend_total_12m.short: Sum of all six education sub-categories
edu_spend_total_12m.long: Sum of all six education sub-categories

any_insured.label: Any HH member insured
any_insured.short: 1 if any member has health card
any_insured.long: 1 if any member has health card

n_insured.label: # insured
n_insured.short: Count of members with health card
n_insured.long: Count of members with health card

n_chronic.label: # chronic conditions
n_chronic.short: Count of members with chronic illness
n_chronic.long: Count of members with chronic illness

n_acute_illness.label: # acute illnesses
n_acute_illness.short: Count of members with acute illness (past 30d)
n_acute_illness.long: Count of members with acute illness (past 30d)

any_health_spending.label: Any health spending
any_health_spending.short: 1 if HH had any medical spending
any_health_spending.long: 1 if HH had any medical spending

hlt_spend_total.label: Total health spend
hlt_spend_total.short: Sum of all five health sub-categories
hlt_spend_total.long: Sum of all five health sub-categories

has_enterprise.label: Operates enterprise
has_enterprise.short: 1 if HH ran any non-ag enterprise this year; 0 otherwise.
has_enterprise.long: 1 if HH ran any non-ag enterprise this year; 0 otherwise.

n_enterprises.label: # enterprises
n_enterprises.short: Number of non-ag enterprises operated by HH.
n_enterprises.long: Number of non-ag enterprises operated by HH.

n_workers_total.label: # workers
n_workers_total.short: Total workers across all HH enterprises (includes unpaid family).
n_workers_total.long: Total workers across all HH enterprises (includes unpaid family).

revenue_12m.label: Revenue 12m
revenue_12m.long: Total gross revenue (Rs.) across all HH enterprises, past 12 months.

expenses_12m.label: Expenses 12m
expenses_12m.short: Total operating expenses = wages + fuel/utilities + raw materials + other operations.
expenses_12m.long: Total operating expenses = wages + fuel/utilities + raw materials + other operations.

capex_12m.label: Capex 12m
capex_12m.short: Capital expenditure: cash or in-kind value spent on assets for the business.
capex_12m.long: Capital expenditure: cash or in-kind value spent on assets for the business.

sector_manufacturing.label: Sector — manuf
sector_manufacturing.short: 1 if HH operated any manufacturing enterprise.
sector_manufacturing.long: 1 if HH operated any manufacturing enterprise.

sector_services.label: Sector — services
sector_services.short: 1 if HH operated any education, health, or community/social service.
sector_services.long: 1 if HH operated any education, health, or community/social service.

sector_trade.label: Sector — trade
sector_trade.short: 1 if HH operated any wholesale/retail enterprise.
sector_trade.long: 1 if HH operated any wholesale/retail enterprise.

sector_hotels.label: Sector — hotels
sector_hotels.short: 1 if HH operated any hotel/restaurant enterprise.
sector_hotels.long: 1 if HH operated any hotel/restaurant enterprise.

sector_transport.label: Sector — transport
sector_transport.short: 1 if HH operated any transport/storage/communications enterprise.
sector_transport.long: 1 if HH operated any transport/storage/communications enterprise.

has_migrant.label: Has any migrant
has_migrant.short: 1 for all rows in migrant-HH-year file.
has_migrant.long: 1 for all rows in migrant-HH-year file.

has_migrant_internal.label: Has internal migrant
has_migrant_internal.short: 1 if household has at least one domestic migrant.
has_migrant_internal.long: 1 if household has at least one domestic migrant.

has_migrant_international.label: Has international migrant
has_migrant_international.short: 1 if household has at least one international migrant.
has_migrant_international.long: 1 if household has at least one international migrant.

has_only_internal.label: Only internal
has_only_internal.short: 1 if household has domestic migrant(s) only.
has_only_internal.long: 1 if household has domestic migrant(s) only.

has_only_international.label: Only international
has_only_international.short: 1 if household has international migrant(s) only.
has_only_international.long: 1 if household has international migrant(s) only.

has_both_internal_and_international.label: Both internal & intl
has_both_internal_and_international.short: 1 if household has both domestic and international migrants.
has_both_internal_and_international.long: 1 if household has both domestic and international migrants.

share_male_migrants.label: Male share of migrants
share_male_migrants.short: Share of migrants who are male.
share_male_migrants.long: Share of migrants who are male.

share_long_term_migrants.label: Long-term share
share_long_term_migrants.short: Share of migrants away more than 24 months.
share_long_term_migrants.long: Share of migrants away more than 24 months.

mig_reason_work.label: Reason: work
mig_reason_work.short: 1 if any migrant moved for work/job/business.
mig_reason_work.long: 1 if any migrant moved for work/job/business.

mig_reason_education.label: Reason: education
mig_reason_education.short: 1 if any migrant moved for education/training.
mig_reason_education.long: 1 if any migrant moved for education/training.

mig_reason_marriage_family.label: Reason: marriage/family
mig_reason_marriage_family.short: 1 if any migrant moved for marriage/family.
mig_reason_marriage_family.long: 1 if any migrant moved for marriage/family.

any_shock.label: Any shock
any_shock.short: Always 1 in this file; file is restricted to HH-years with shocks.
any_shock.long: Always 1 in this file; file is restricted to HH-years with shocks.

n_shocks.label: # shocks
n_shocks.short: Number of shocks experienced by HH in year.
n_shocks.long: Number of shocks experienced by HH in year.

total_loss_rs.label: Total loss (Rs)
total_loss_rs.short: Total reported monetary loss from all shocks.
total_loss_rs.long: Total reported monetary loss from all shocks.

health_shock_any.label: Health shock
health_shock_any.short: 1 if HH experienced illness or injury shock.
health_shock_any.long: 1 if HH experienced illness or injury shock.

natural_disaster_shock_any.label: Natural disaster
natural_disaster_shock_any.short: 1 if HH experienced earthquake, flood, landslide, fire, hail, or lightning shock.
natural_disaster_shock_any.long: 1 if HH experienced earthquake, flood, landslide, fire, hail, or lightning shock.

agricultural_shock_any.label: Agricultural shock
agricultural_shock_any.short: 1 if HH experienced drought, pest, livestock, or harvest shock.
agricultural_shock_any.long: 1 if HH experienced drought, pest, livestock, or harvest shock.

economic_shock_any.label: Economic shock
economic_shock_any.short: 1 if HH experienced price, fuel, job, bankruptcy, contract, default, or displacement shock.
economic_shock_any.long: 1 if HH experienced price, fuel, job, bankruptcy, contract, default, or displacement shock.

any_coping_reported.label: Any coping reported
any_coping_reported.short: 1 if HH reported any coping response.
any_coping_reported.long: 1 if HH reported any coping response.

cope_savings_any.label: Cope: savings
cope_savings_any.short: 1 if HH used savings or reduced consumption.
cope_savings_any.long: 1 if HH used savings or reduced consumption.

cope_migration_remittance_any.label: Cope: migration / remit
cope_migration_remittance_any.short: 1 if HH used migration or remittance to cope.
cope_migration_remittance_any.long: 1 if HH used migration or remittance to cope.

cope_public_private_aid_any.label: Cope: aid
cope_public_private_aid_any.short: 1 if HH used government, NGO, or aid support.
cope_public_private_aid_any.long: 1 if HH used government, NGO, or aid support.

public_support_any.label: Any public support
public_support_any.short: 1 if HH received public cash, public in-kind support, or public works.
public_support_any.long: 1 if HH received public cash, public in-kind support, or public works.

public_support_amt.label: Public support amount
public_support_amt.short: Total value of public support: cash + in-kind + public works earnings.
public_support_amt.long: Total value of public support: cash + in-kind + public works earnings.

public_cash_any.label: Public cash
public_cash_any.short: 1 if HH received any public cash transfer.
public_cash_any.long: 1 if HH received any public cash transfer.

demographic_cash_any.label: Demographic cash
demographic_cash_any.short: 1 if HH received demographic social protection: old-age, widow, disability, child, maternal, or endangered-ethnic support.
demographic_cash_any.long: 1 if HH received demographic social protection: old-age, widow, disability, child, maternal, or endangered-ethnic support.

disaster_cash_any.label: Disaster cash
disaster_cash_any.short: 1 if HH received earthquake or emergency ad-hoc support.
disaster_cash_any.long: 1 if HH received earthquake or emergency ad-hoc support.

public_inkind_any.label: Public in-kind
public_inkind_any.short: 1 if HH received public in-kind transfer.
public_inkind_any.long: 1 if HH received public in-kind transfer.

public_work_any.label: Public works
public_work_any.short: 1 if HH participated in public works.
public_work_any.long: 1 if HH participated in public works.

private_support_any.label: Private support
private_support_any.short: 1 if HH received private gift or NGO support.
private_support_any.long: 1 if HH received private gift or NGO support.

new_firms.short: Number of active NEC 2018 firms in the municipality that report opening/founding in this year.
new_firms.long: Number of active NEC 2018 firms in the municipality that report opening/founding in this year.

new_firms_finance_prof_realestate.long: Number of new/opening firms in the industry group shown in the variable name for this lgcode-year.

new_firms_transport_storage.label: Transport & storage

new_firms_transport_storage.long: Number of new/opening firms in the industry group shown in the variable name for this lgcode-year.

new_firms_admin_support.label: Admin & support

new_firms_admin_support.long: Number of new/opening firms in the industry group shown in the variable name for this lgcode-year.

new_firms_information_comm.label: Information & comms

new_firms_information_comm.long: Number of new/opening firms in the industry group shown in the variable name for this lgcode-year.

new_firms_size_1_worker.label: Micro (1 worker)
new_firms_size_1_worker.short: Number of new/opening firms in the employee-size group shown in the variable name for this lgcode-year.
new_firms_size_1_worker.long: Number of new/opening firms in the employee-size group shown in the variable name for this lgcode-year.

new_firms_size_2_9_workers.label: Small (2–9)
new_firms_size_2_9_workers.short: Number of new/opening firms in the employee-size group shown in the variable name for this lgcode-year.
new_firms_size_2_9_workers.long: Number of new/opening firms in the employee-size group shown in the variable name for this lgcode-year.

new_firms_size_10_50_workers.label: Medium (10–50)
new_firms_size_10_50_workers.short: Number of new/opening firms in the employee-size group shown in the variable name for this lgcode-year.

n_firms.label: # firms
n_firms.short: Total number of active firms observed in NEC 2018 in the municipality.
n_firms.long: Total number of active firms observed in NEC 2018 in the municipality.

log_n_firms.label: log(# firms)
log_n_firms.short: log(1 + total number of active firms).
log_n_firms.long: log(1 + total number of active firms).

n_firms_agriculture.label: Agriculture
n_firms_agriculture.short: Number of active firms in the municipality belonging to the industry group shown in the variable name.
n_firms_agriculture.long: Number of active firms in the municipality belonging to the industry group shown in the variable name.

n_firms_manufacturing.label: Manufacturing
n_firms_manufacturing.short: Number of active firms in the municipality belonging to the industry group shown in the variable name.
n_firms_manufacturing.long: Number of active firms in the municipality belonging to the industry group shown in the variable name.

n_firms_construction.label: Construction
n_firms_construction.short: Number of active firms in the municipality belonging to the industry group shown in the variable name.
n_firms_construction.long: Number of active firms in the municipality belonging to the industry group shown in the variable name.

n_firms_trade_retail.label: Trade & retail
n_firms_trade_retail.short: Number of active firms in the municipality belonging to the industry group shown in the variable name.

n_firms_other_services.label: Other services

n_firms_utilities_mining.label: Utilities & mining
n_firms_utilities_mining.short: Number of active firms in the municipality belonging to the industry group shown in the variable name.
n_firms_utilities_mining.long: Number of active firms in the municipality belonging to the industry group shown in the variable name.

share_agriculture.label: Agriculture
share_agriculture.short: Share of active firms in the municipality belonging to the industry group shown in the variable name.
share_agriculture.long: Share of active firms in the municipality belonging to the industry group shown in the variable name.

share_manufacturing.label: Manufacturing
share_manufacturing.short: Share of active firms in the municipality belonging to the industry group shown in the variable name.
share_manufacturing.long: Share of active firms in the municipality belonging to the industry group shown in the variable name.

share_construction.label: Construction
share_construction.short: Share of active firms in the municipality belonging to the industry group shown in the variable name.
share_construction.long: Share of active firms in the municipality belonging to the industry group shown in the variable name.

share_trade_retail.label: Trade & retail
share_trade_retail.short: Share of active firms in the municipality belonging to the industry group shown in the variable name.
share_trade_retail.long: Share of active firms in the municipality belonging to the industry group shown in the variable name.

share_other_services.label: Other services
share_other_services.short: Share of active firms in the municipality belonging to the industry group shown in the variable name.
share_other_services.long: Share of active firms in the municipality belonging to the industry group shown in the variable name.

share_utilities_mining.label: Utilities & mining
share_utilities_mining.short: Share of active firms in the municipality belonging to the industry group shown in the variable name.
share_utilities_mining.long: Share of active firms in the municipality belonging to the industry group shown in the variable name.

industry_hhi.label: Industry HHI
industry_hhi.short: Industry Herfindahl-Hirschman Index: sum of squared industry shares.
industry_hhi.long: Industry Herfindahl-Hirschman Index: sum of squared industry shares. Higher values indicate more concentrated local industry structure.

industry_diversity.label: Industry diversity
industry_diversity.long: Industry diversity index: 1 - industry_hhi. Higher values indicate a more diversified local enterprise structure.

n_industries_present.label: # industries present
n_industries_present.short: Number of compact industry groups with at least one active firm in the municipality.
n_industries_present.long: Number of compact industry groups with at least one active firm in the municipality.

rev_total.label: Total revenue
rev_total.short: Total annual revenue across active firms in the municipality.
rev_total.long: Total annual revenue across active firms in the municipality.

log_rev_total.label: log(revenue)
log_rev_total.short: Log transform of the corresponding aggregate amount variable: log(1 + amount).
log_rev_total.long: Log transform of the corresponding aggregate amount variable: log(1 + amount). Negative values are coded as NA before logging.

exp_total.label: Total expenditure
exp_total.short: Total annual expenses across active firms in the municipality.
exp_total.long: Total annual expenses across active firms in the municipality.

log_exp_total.label: log(expenditure)
log_exp_total.short: Log transform of the corresponding aggregate amount variable: log(1 + amount).
log_exp_total.long: Log transform of the corresponding aggregate amount variable: log(1 + amount). Negative values are coded as NA before logging.

wage_bill_total.label: Total wage bill
wage_bill_total.short: Total annual salary/wage bill across active firms in the municipality.
wage_bill_total.long: Total annual salary/wage bill across active firms in the municipality.

log_wage_bill_total.label: log(wage bill)
log_wage_bill_total.short: Log transform of the corresponding aggregate amount variable: log(1 + amount).
log_wage_bill_total.long: Log transform of the corresponding aggregate amount variable: log(1 + amount). Negative values are coded as NA before logging.

value_added_total.label: Total value added
value_added_total.short: Total value-added proxy: annual revenue minus annual expenses, aggregated across active firms.
value_added_total.long: Total value-added proxy: annual revenue minus annual expenses, aggregated across active firms.

log_value_added_total.label: log(value added)
log_value_added_total.short: Log transform of the corresponding aggregate amount variable: log(1 + amount).
log_value_added_total.long: Log transform of the corresponding aggregate amount variable: log(1 + amount). Negative values are coded as NA before logging.

value_added_clean_total.label: Total value added (cleaned)
value_added_clean_total.short: Total cleaned value added, excluding extreme finance records where expenses exceed revenue by more than 100 times.
value_added_clean_total.long: Total cleaned value added, excluding extreme finance records where expenses exceed revenue by more than 100 times.

log_value_added_clean_total.label: log(value added cleaned)
log_value_added_clean_total.short: Log transform of the corresponding aggregate amount variable: log(1 + amount).
log_value_added_clean_total.long: Log transform of the corresponding aggregate amount variable: log(1 + amount). Negative values are coded as NA before logging.

cap_total.label: Total capital
cap_total.short: Total capital across active firms in the municipality.
cap_total.long: Total capital across active firms in the municipality.

log_cap_total.label: log(capital)
log_cap_total.short: Log transform of the corresponding aggregate amount variable: log(1 + amount).
log_cap_total.long: Log transform of the corresponding aggregate amount variable: log(1 + amount). Negative values are coded as NA before logging.

cap_fixed_total.label: Fixed capital
cap_fixed_total.short: Total fixed capital across active firms in the municipality, where available.
cap_fixed_total.long: Total fixed capital across active firms in the municipality, where available.

log_cap_fixed_total.label: log(fixed capital)
log_cap_fixed_total.short: Log transform of the corresponding aggregate amount variable: log(1 + amount).
log_cap_fixed_total.long: Log transform of the corresponding aggregate amount variable: log(1 + amount). Negative values are coded as NA before logging.

emp_total.label: Total employment
emp_total.short: Total employment across active firms in the municipality.
emp_total.long: Total employment across active firms in the municipality.

mean_rev_per_worker.label: Mean rev / worker
mean_rev_per_worker.short: Mean firm-level annual revenue per worker in the municipality, using firms with positive employment.
mean_rev_per_worker.long: Mean firm-level annual revenue per worker in the municipality, using firms with positive employment.

median_rev_per_worker.label: Median rev / worker
median_rev_per_worker.short: Median firm-level annual revenue per worker in the municipality, using firms with positive employment.
median_rev_per_worker.long: Median firm-level annual revenue per worker in the municipality, using firms with positive employment.

p90_rev_per_worker.label: p90 rev / worker
p90_rev_per_worker.short: 90th percentile of firm-level annual revenue per worker in the municipality, using firms with positive employment.
p90_rev_per_worker.long: 90th percentile of firm-level annual revenue per worker in the municipality, using firms with positive employment.

mean_value_added_per_worker.label: Mean VA / worker
mean_value_added_per_worker.short: Mean firm-level value added per worker in the municipality, using firms with positive employment.
mean_value_added_per_worker.long: Mean firm-level value added per worker in the municipality, using firms with positive employment.

median_value_added_per_worker.label: Median VA / worker
median_value_added_per_worker.short: Median firm-level value added per worker in the municipality, using firms with positive employment.
median_value_added_per_worker.long: Median firm-level value added per worker in the municipality, using firms with positive employment.

mean_value_added_clean_per_worker.label: Mean VA (clean) / worker
mean_value_added_clean_per_worker.short: Mean firm-level cleaned value added per worker, excluding extreme finance records, using firms with positive employment.
mean_value_added_clean_per_worker.long: Mean firm-level cleaned value added per worker, excluding extreme finance records, using firms with positive employment.

median_value_added_clean_per_worker.label: Median VA (clean) / worker
median_value_added_clean_per_worker.short: Median firm-level cleaned value added per worker, excluding extreme finance records, using firms with positive employment.
median_value_added_clean_per_worker.long: Median firm-level cleaned value added per worker, excluding extreme finance records, using firms with positive employment.

mean_capital_per_worker.label: Mean capital / worker
mean_capital_per_worker.short: Mean firm-level capital per worker in the municipality, using firms with positive employment and positive capital.
mean_capital_per_worker.long: Mean firm-level capital per worker in the municipality, using firms with positive employment and positive capital.

median_capital_per_worker.label: Median capital / worker
median_capital_per_worker.short: Median firm-level capital per worker in the municipality, using firms with positive employment and positive capital.
median_capital_per_worker.long: Median firm-level capital per worker in the municipality, using firms with positive employment and positive capital.

mean_revenue_per_capital.label: Mean rev / capital
mean_revenue_per_capital.short: Mean firm-level revenue-to-capital ratio in the municipality, using firms with positive capital.
mean_revenue_per_capital.long: Mean firm-level revenue-to-capital ratio in the municipality, using firms with positive capital.

median_revenue_per_capital.label: Median rev / capital
median_revenue_per_capital.short: Median firm-level revenue-to-capital ratio in the municipality, using firms with positive capital.
median_revenue_per_capital.long: Median firm-level revenue-to-capital ratio in the municipality, using firms with positive capital.

mean_value_added_margin.label: Mean VA margin
mean_value_added_margin.short: Mean firm-level cleaned value added divided by annual revenue, using firms with positive revenue.
mean_value_added_margin.long: Mean firm-level cleaned value added divided by annual revenue, using firms with positive revenue.

median_value_added_margin.label: Median VA margin
median_value_added_margin.short: Median firm-level cleaned value added divided by annual revenue, using firms with positive revenue.
median_value_added_margin.long: Median firm-level cleaned value added divided by annual revenue, using firms with positive revenue.

wage_share_of_revenue.label: Wage share of revenue
wage_share_of_revenue.short: Aggregate wage bill divided by aggregate annual revenue.
wage_share_of_revenue.long: Aggregate wage bill divided by aggregate annual revenue.

value_added_share_of_revenue.label: VA share of revenue
value_added_share_of_revenue.short: Aggregate value added divided by aggregate annual revenue.
value_added_share_of_revenue.long: Aggregate value added divided by aggregate annual revenue.

capital_intensity_aggregate.label: Capital intensity (aggregate)
capital_intensity_aggregate.short: Aggregate capital divided by aggregate employment.
capital_intensity_aggregate.long: Aggregate capital divided by aggregate employment.

exp_rev_ratio_aggregate.label: Expenditure / revenue (aggregate)
exp_rev_ratio_aggregate.short: Aggregate expenses divided by aggregate revenue.
exp_rev_ratio_aggregate.long: Aggregate expenses divided by aggregate revenue. Useful for identifying municipalities with implausible accounting totals.

share_positive_revenue.label: Share with positive revenue
share_positive_revenue.short: Share of active firms with positive annual revenue.
share_positive_revenue.long: Share of active firms with positive annual revenue.

share_positive_capital.label: Share with positive capital
share_positive_capital.short: Share of active firms with positive capital.
share_positive_capital.long: Share of active firms with positive capital.

n_extreme_finance_records.label: # extreme-finance records
n_extreme_finance_records.short: Number of firm records flagged as extreme finance records before computing cleaned value added.
n_extreme_finance_records.long: Number of firm records flagged as extreme finance records before computing cleaned value added.

share_extreme_finance_records.label: Share extreme-finance records
share_extreme_finance_records.short: Share of firm records flagged as extreme finance records before computing cleaned value added.
share_extreme_finance_records.long: Share of firm records flagged as extreme finance records before computing cleaned value added.

value_added_negative_flag.label: Has negative VA
value_added_negative_flag.short: Indicator equal to 1 if raw aggregate value added is negative.
value_added_negative_flag.long: Indicator equal to 1 if raw aggregate value added is negative.

extreme_exp_rev_ratio_flag.label: Extreme exp/rev ratio
extreme_exp_rev_ratio_flag.short: Indicator equal to 1 if aggregate expense/revenue ratio is greater than 100.
extreme_exp_rev_ratio_flag.long: Indicator equal to 1 if aggregate expense/revenue ratio is greater than 100.

mean_emp_per_firm.label: Mean emp / firm
mean_emp_per_firm.short: Mean number of employees per active firm, using positive employment values.
mean_emp_per_firm.long: Mean number of employees per active firm, using positive employment values.

median_emp_per_firm.label: Median emp / firm
median_emp_per_firm.short: Median number of employees per active firm, using positive employment values.
median_emp_per_firm.long: Median number of employees per active firm, using positive employment values.

p90_emp_per_firm.label: p90 emp / firm
p90_emp_per_firm.short: 90th percentile of employees per active firm, using positive employment values.
p90_emp_per_firm.long: 90th percentile of employees per active firm, using positive employment values.

n_firms_size_1_worker.label: Micro (1)
n_firms_size_1_worker.short: Number of active firms in the employee-size group shown in the variable name.
n_firms_size_1_worker.long: Number of active firms in the employee-size group shown in the variable name.

n_firms_size_2_9_workers.label: Small (2–9)
n_firms_size_2_9_workers.short: Number of active firms in the employee-size group shown in the variable name.
n_firms_size_2_9_workers.long: Number of active firms in the employee-size group shown in the variable name.

n_firms_size_10_50_workers.label: Medium (10–50)
n_firms_size_10_50_workers.short: Number of active firms in the employee-size group shown in the variable name.
n_firms_size_10_50_workers.long: Number of active firms in the employee-size group shown in the variable name.

n_firms_size_51plus_workers.label: Large (51+)
n_firms_size_51plus_workers.short: Number of active firms in the employee-size group shown in the variable name.
n_firms_size_51plus_workers.long: Number of active firms in the employee-size group shown in the variable name.

formality_index.label: Formality index
formality_index.short: Simple average of share_registered, share_tax_registered, share_keeps_accounts, and share_operates_year_round, ignoring missing components.
formality_index.long: Simple average of share_registered, share_tax_registered, share_keeps_accounts, and share_operates_year_round, ignoring missing components.

share_registered.label: Share registered
share_registered.short: Share of active firms that are registered.
share_registered.long: Share of active firms that are registered.

share_tax_registered.label: Share tax-registered
share_tax_registered.short: Share of active firms that are tax registered.
share_tax_registered.long: Share of active firms that are tax registered.

share_keeps_accounts.label: Share keeps accounts
share_keeps_accounts.short: Share of active firms that keep accounts.
share_keeps_accounts.long: Share of active firms that keep accounts.

share_operates_year_round.label: Share year-round
share_operates_year_round.short: Share of active firms that operate year-round.
share_operates_year_round.long: Share of active firms that operate year-round.

share_borrowed.label: Share borrowed
share_borrowed.short: Share of active firms reporting borrowing/loan use, where available.
share_borrowed.long: Share of active firms reporting borrowing/loan use, where available.

share_uses_formal_credit.label: Share formal credit
share_uses_formal_credit.short: Share of active firms using formal credit, where available.
share_uses_formal_credit.long: Share of active firms using formal credit, where available.

share_has_foreign_capital.label: Share foreign capital
share_has_foreign_capital.short: Share of active firms with foreign capital, where available.
share_has_foreign_capital.long: Share of active firms with foreign capital, where available.

share_female_led.label: Share female-led
share_female_led.short: Share of active firms classified as female-led, where available.
share_female_led.long: Share of active firms classified as female-led, where available.
